LilycoveCity_DepartmentStoreRooftop_Text.label: LilycoveCity_DepartmentStoreRooftop_Text_SetDatesForClearOutSales
LilycoveCity_DepartmentStoreRooftop_Text.raw_text: 他们从不清仓甩卖\n什么的吗？\p我看电视的时候\n从没看到过商业广告。$
LilycoveCity_DepartmentStoreRooftop_Text.display_text:
他们从不清仓甩卖
什么的吗？

我看电视的时候
从没看到过商业广告。

LilycoveCity_DepartmentStoreRooftop_Text.label: LilycoveCity_DepartmentStoreRooftop_Text_BeenWaitingForClearOutSale
LilycoveCity_DepartmentStoreRooftop_Text.raw_text: 呀！这次清仓我已经\n等了很久了。\p有些东西只有在这儿才能买到，\n我要大堆大堆地买回去！$
LilycoveCity_DepartmentStoreRooftop_Text.display_text:
呀！这次清仓我已经
等了很久了。

有些东西只有在这儿才能买到，
我要大堆大堆地买回去！

LilycoveCity_DepartmentStoreRooftop_Text.label: LilycoveCity_DepartmentStoreRooftop_Text_WhichDrinkWouldYouLike
LilycoveCity_DepartmentStoreRooftop_Text.raw_text: 一台自动售货机。\n想买些什么饮料？$
LilycoveCity_DepartmentStoreRooftop_Text.display_text:
一台自动售货机。
想买些什么饮料？

LilycoveCity_DepartmentStoreRooftop_Text.label: LilycoveCity_DepartmentStoreRooftop_Text_CanOfDrinkDroppedDown
LilycoveCity_DepartmentStoreRooftop_Text.display_text:
当啷！

一罐{STR_VAR_1}掉出来了。

LilycoveCity_DepartmentStoreRooftop_Text.label: LilycoveCity_DepartmentStoreRooftop_Text_ExtraCanOfDrinkDroppedDown
LilycoveCity_DepartmentStoreRooftop_Text.raw_text: 当啷！\p万岁！又一罐{STR_VAR_1}\n掉出来了！$
